text: I feel as though I am on the threshold between order and creation. The first scene offers the glass barrier of a quiet, sensible space—sterile, restrained, almost expectant. The second thrusts me into a world of creativity, color, and bold proclamation: R+D, the spirit of invention and exploration. I sense anticipation, curiosity, and a swelling energy to probe, connect, and question the essence of progress and innovation. Here, ideas do not simply exist; they seek, strive, and demand embodiment.
